entries.t:
阿克斯布里奇（美国、加拿大、英国地名）
乌克斯桥（英国地名）
abbr. unexploded ordnance 未爆炸的军火

entries.d: n (legal terminology) the Latin word for wife

a. Dotingly fond of, or servilely submissive to, a wife;
uxorious; also, becoming a wife; pertaining to a wife.

entries.t: [法] 杀妻的, 犯杀妻罪的
entries.d: a. Of or pertaining to uxoricide; tending to uxoricide.

entries.t:
n. 杀妻, 杀妻者
[法] 杀妻, 杀妻者, 杀妻罪
entries.d:
n. a husband who murders his wife
n. the murder of a wife by her husband

entries.t: a. (人类学用语)(婚后)居住在女方的,入赘风俗的

a. 溺爱妻子的, 一味顺从妻子的, 怕老婆的
[法] 对妻子过分宠爱的, 怕老婆的
entries.d: s. foolishly fond of or submissive to your wife

entries.t: adv. 疼爱妻子地, 顺从妻子地
entries.d: r in a loving and uxorious manner
n. foolish fondness for or excessive submissiveness to one's wife
